description: Bowling et al. fitted execution noise: Student-t(nu=5), speed scale 9.5mm/s, aim scale sigma_theta(w) in [1.16e-3, 3.65e-3] rad (larger w -> smaller angular error). Spin/y0 remain explicit guesses because Bowling did not specify them.

meta.notes: std[0]=0.0123 is Gaussian-equiv of Student-t(5, scale=0.0095). angle_scale_range is the intended Student-t scale range from Bowling, in radians, and overrides std[1] during sampling. std[2]=0.08 and std[3]=0.015 remain guessed spin/y0 noise because Bowling did not specify them.
